name: Ghost Town
hints: The main street of a ghost town. There's a barbershop and a jail here.
GO BARB to enter the barbershop. GO JAIL to enter the jail.
The barbershop has a Stetson hat. The jail has a golden derringer treasure.
Explore both buildings. E=road east (17), W=more town west (2).
notes: Starting room. Main street with barbershop (room 16) and jail (room 13). E=road (17), W=town (2).
